nodes.label: Handles the surgical AST validation of C files modified by a patch.
Extracts the list of C files modified by the patch.
Extracts compilation flags dynamically from kernel Makefiles for a specific file
Validates the patch by checking the AST purity of modified files.         Return
Orchestrates the priority cascading, dry-runs, application, and rollbacks.
Defines the cascaded priority for the kernel patches.     Lower priority number
Calculates a deterministic SHA-256 hash of a directory's contents.     Includes
Calculates a deterministic hash for upstream packages that lack specs.     Hashe
